appstream.appblockbuilder.vpcconfig.CfnA: Describes VPC configuration information for fleets and image builders.

appstream.appblockbuilder.vpcconfig.Secu.Description: The identifiers of the security groups for the fleet or image builder.

appstream.appblockbuilder.vpcconfig.Subn.Description: The identifiers of the subnets to which a network interface is attached from the fleet instance or image builder instance. Fleet instances use one or more subnets. Image builder instances use one subnet.
